title: TEST: IMAGE insieme a ENEMY
description: Scena di combattimento senza backgroundImage, ambientata in una caverna (loc_caves): mai provato insieme, verifica che il blocco tag contenga sia ENEMY che IMAGE nella stessa risposta.

scenes.narrativeText: The cave mouth swallows the daylight as you step inside, wild vegetation giving way to damp rock. A low growl echoes from the darkness ahead, and two glinting eyes catch what little light remains before the creature lunges.
The creature falls still. You catch your breath in the sudden silence of the cave, the fight over as quickly as it began.
The creature proves too strong. Your journey ends here, in the dark of a nameless cave.
